name: skiaui
description: A lightweight Skia UI runtime with HTML/CSS parsing, Yoga layout, DOM events, optional Win32 adapter, and optional Win32/DX12 host.

demo.description: Build and install the optional SkiaUiDesk demo executable.

win32.description: Build the optional Win32 platform adapter target SkiaUI::SkuiWin32.

win32-dx12.description: Build the optional Win32/DX12 host target SkiaUI::SkuiWin32Dx12.
